items.title: IPL Orange Cap table - Samson in top five
items.summary: Samson made a match-winning 87* against DC and displaced Sai Sudharsan from the No.5 spot
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Jaylen Brown is playing the victim card again, but his NBA officiating 'agenda' claims hold no merit
items.summary: Brown, who was fined $50,000 for his recent comments, is hung up on his perceived place in the NBA's superstar hierarchy
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: The league is the dream - but is this Arsenal's moment in Europe?
items.summary: All the talk has been about Arsenal's Premier League title challenge - but is this now the Gunners' time to conquer Europe?
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
